    n = nums.length
    if n == 0
        return -1
    end

    # 1. Precompute SMin array: s_min[i] stores min(nums[i..n-1])
    s_min = Array(n)

    for i in (n - 2).downto(0)

    end

    # 2. Iterate and check stability, tracking current PMax
    # Since nums[i] >= 0, initializing current_max to -1 is safe for comparison.
    current_max = -1

        # Calculate Unstable Value: U_i = PMax[i] - SMin[i]
        unstable_value = current_max - s_min[i]

    end

    # If no stable index is found

end
